mapper.insert: insert into reading_report (user_id, semester, total_borrow, fav_category, analysis_text, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{semester}, #{totalBorrow}, #{favCategory}, #{analysisText}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select r.id, r.user_id as userId, stu.name as user_name, r.semester, r.total_borrow, r.fav_category, r.analysis_text, r.create_time from reading_report r left join student stu on r.user_id = stu.id where r.user_id = #{userId} and r.semester = #{semester} order by r.create_time desc limit 1

select r.id, r.user_id as userId, stu.name as user_name, r.semester, r.total_borrow, r.fav_category, r.analysis_text, r.create_time from reading_report r left join student stu on r.user_id = stu.id where r.id = #{id}
